docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, SURITHIA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SURITHIA JACKSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ROBINSON HERNANDEZ MEJARES IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, SURITHIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEJARES, ROBINSON HERNANDEZ STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 08/13/2025. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER/ADVANCED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
